question: Based on the map, which statement about internet penetration in the labelled countries is most accurate?

options.A: Countries shown in grey have the lowest internet penetration.
options.B: Among the coloured countries, the United States has one of the highest internet penetration levels.
options.C: All coloured countries have roughly the same internet penetration.
options.D: Internet penetration is highest in countries shown in grey.

explanation: At least one of the labelled regions appears grey, indicating missing data rather than a low value. Because we do not know that region's value, we cannot safely say which labelled region truly has the highest value.
